query: what are the worst anomalies on line 7 and where should I dig?
expected_behavior: Ranks by CONSERVATIVE (tolerance-adjusted) ERF via the Trusted Asset function, NOT raw depth
Selects the latest METAL-LOSS (MFL/UT) run, not the latest run overall
Assesses interacting/adjacent corrosion as clusters (v_cluster_severity), not independent features
States assumptions (run, tolerance basis, safety factor) and treats response classes as illustrative, not compliance
